vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements: Base rotary joint, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409
Food-grade hygienic design, IP67 sealed joints, NSF-compliant materials
Base plate with mounting holes, leveling, and cable entry

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress on harmonic drive due to uneven heat distribution.
risk.mit: Implement a uniform heat sink design around the harmonic drive.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage due to insufficient strain relief.
risk.mit: Ensure all cable exits have strain relief features.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to unclear assembly sequence.
risk.mit: Define a clear assembly sequence with tool, torque, and datum per step.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure due to inadequate reinforcement in critical areas.
risk.mit: Add structural reinforcement in areas subjected to high stress.

risk.desc: Risk of water ingress due to improper sealing of cable entry.
risk.mit: Ensure proper sealing of cable entry with a grommet and watertight seal.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Base rotary joint, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

physics_paths.path: Base plate to floor via mounting holes
Heat transfer from harmonic drive to base plate and environment
Power and signal cables from base plate to motor controller
Cable entry through base plate for maintenance

internal_feature_targets.description: Pattern of 8 mounting holes for floor mounting
Pattern of 4 holes for motor housing
Grommet for cable entry into base plate

manufacturing_strategy.process: CNC machining with LPBF for complex internal features
manufacturing_strategy.support: Support structures for LPBF internal features
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: CMM for critical dimensions, visual for surface finish

verification_focus.check: Flatness and parallelism of mounting holes
Circularity and perpendicularity to base plate
Internal clearance and fit with harmonic drive

risk.desc: Material selection may not meet NSF compliance standards for food-grade applications.

risk.desc: CNC machining may not achieve the required surface finish for IP67 sealing.
risk.mit: Consider LPBF for better surface finish on sealing surfaces.

risk.desc: Thermal expansion may affect joint clearance over time.
risk.mit: Include thermal expansion joints in design.

risk.desc: Insufficient inspection access may hinder field serviceability.
risk.mit: Design additional access panels for inspection and maintenance.

risk.desc: Cable routing may become congested with additional harnesses.
risk.mit: Optimize harness routing and consider modular harness design.

Service access for encoder maintenance and inspection.
